subcodes.first_line: O Lion of God! Behold the grace and bounty of the Ancient Beauty and the Most Great Name, for a hundred thousand mujtahids [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای اسدالله فضل و عنایت جمال قدم و اسم اعظمرا ملاحظه نما که صد هزار مجتهدین و
subcodes.subjects: @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @praise and encouragement, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @spiritual transformation, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision
